title: YTPMV: Kung Fu Cutman!
description:
WAV: http://www.mediafire.com/?sharekey=9e8e65075b96c3390dec85adfe0a530ae04e75f6e8ebb871

Due to a horrible glitch after exiting Adobe Premiere Pro 2.0 it muted my entire audio completely but kept my video the same so I had to redo the entire song, the glitch ruined it for me because I had to take out a small portion of the song and skip to the ending segment.

I blame myself for exiting the program, if I finished it without taking a break the song would have turned out a whole lot better. I hope you still enjoy what was left of it, it's only 90% done to me.

Enjoy... -_-
